Name: Meadow Connection Dgraph
Tagline: DGraph graph database connection provider for Meadow

			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#2768dc"/>

					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="21" fill="#e7512e"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="28" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">MCD</text>
	</svg>
